# Stock For Newbie

Stock For Newbie is a stock brokerage fee calculator
for beginner investors in Korea.

The service compares:

- Korean stock brokerage fees
- US stock brokerage fees
- Exchange fees
- Tax costs
- Event discount fees

Main features:

- Domestic stock fee comparison
- US stock fee comparison
- Exchange rate conversion
- Real-time exchange rate
- Profit simulation
- Broker comparison

Official website:
https://stock-for-newbie.vercel.app

Language:
Korean

Category:
Finance
Investment
Brokerage
Stock Trading
